description: Server-side rendered application built with Next.js

llm_prompt.title: Integrate with a Coding Agent Prompt
llm_prompt.description: Use AI to generate integration code for your Next.js application
llm_prompt.content:
# Integrate {{productName}} Authentication in Next.js Application

## Context
I have a Next.js application and I want to integrate {{productName}}'s authentication system using the @thunderid/nextjs SDK with {{productName}}-hosted login pages.

## Requirements
- Use @thunderid/nextjs SDK for authentication
- Configure {{productName}}-hosted login pages
- Implement sign-in and sign-out functionality using prebuilt components
- Display signed-in user's profile information
- Handle authentication state on the server side

## Configuration
- **Client ID**: {{clientId}}
- **Client Secret**: {{clientSecret}}
- **Base URL**: https://localhost:8090 (or your {{productName}} instance URL)
- **SDK**: @thunderid/nextjs

## IMPORTANT Configuration Rules
- Use ThunderIDProvider from @thunderid/nextjs/server in layout.tsx
- Store Client Secret in THUNDERID_CLIENT_SECRET env var (server-only, never expose to client)
- Store Client ID in NEXT_PUBLIC_THUNDERID_CLIENT_ID env var
- Store Base URL in NEXT_PUBLIC_THUNDERID_BASE_URL env var
- Store after sign-in URL in NEXT_PUBLIC_THUNDERID_AFTER_SIGN_IN_URL env var

## Implementation Steps
1. Create a Next.js app: `npx create-next-app@latest nextjs-demo`
2. Install @thunderid/nextjs: `npm install @thunderid/nextjs`
3. Create .env.local with the configuration values
4. Add middleware.ts at the project root for the middleware
5. Wrap your app with <ThunderIDProvider /> in app/layout.tsx
6. Add <SignInButton /> for signed-out users and <SignOutButton /> for signed-in users
7. Use <SignedIn> and <SignedOut> components to conditionally render UI
8. Run the development server: `NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 npm run dev`

Please provide complete, working code with proper configuration for {{productName}} authentication using the @thunderid/nextjs SDK.
